overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian armor exploring the harbor of Alexandria. The character walks along the waterfront with the famous Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance, then turns inland through bustling town squares with classical architecture and NPC pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient harbor plaza with siege equipment and ship masts

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the open plaza toward the waterfront, passing wooden siege towers

entered.detail: large wooden tower structure with wheels and beams
ancient galley with tall masts and furled sails docked at harbor
tall white stone lighthouse tower visible across the water
cobblestone and patterned stone ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit ancient harbor plaza with cobblestone pavement. Wooden siege towers stand near the waterfront as the character approaches the dock area, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria visible in the distance across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock with ancient ships and lighthouse view

events.description: character reaches dock edge, pauses to view lighthouse, then turns around to walk back inland

agents.ego_description: character walking along the wooden dock, observing the lighthouse and ships, then turning back toward the city

entered.detail: wooden pier structure extending over the water
stacks of wooden crates and cargo on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden harbor dock beneath the rigging of ancient ships, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria prominent in the background. After reaching the dock edge, the character turns and begins walking back toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with mosaic pavement and classical temple

events.description: entering area with increased pedestrian NPC activity and market stalls

agents.ego_description: character walking through the bustling town square, passing citizens in ancient dress and approaching a large columned building

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking toward the character
man in white tunic standing near the temple entrance

entered.detail: large stone building with tall columns and ornate entrance
intricate geometric patterned stone tiles covering the ground
raised stone planters with red flowers and greenery

segments.scene_description: The character enters a lively town square with detailed mosaic pavement and classical architecture. Various NPCs in period clothing walk through the area as the character passes a large columned temple building with decorative stone flower beds along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending street between stone walls with staircase

events.description: moving from open square into narrower corridor with high retaining walls

agents.ego_description: character walking up the inclined stone path toward the staircase, passing between high walls

notable_agents.action: man in gray tunic walking down the path toward the character

entered.detail: wide stone stairs ascending between retaining walls
tall stone walls lining both sides of the path
orange fabric awning extending from building facade

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open square into a narrower ascending corridor flanked by high stone retaining walls. The path leads toward a stone staircase, with an orange canopy visible on the right and sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sunlit waterfront of an ancient harbor into the dense, ascending corridors of a bustling city. It begins in a cobblestone plaza where wooden siege towers line the way toward the docks, with the Lighthouse of Alexandria looming in the distance across the water. As the camera follows the character along the wooden piers beneath the rigging of ships, the perspective shifts away from the sea and turns back toward the city center. The scene then opens into a lively town square featuring mosaic pavements and classical columned temples, where pedestrians in period clothing navigate around decorative stone flower beds. Finally, the open square narrows into an ascending corridor flanked by high stone walls, leading the camera toward a stone staircase and an orange canopy.
